package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_tests_depend_on_http_transport_types: Repository tests that assert HTTP DTOs or handler-layer types.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule137NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule137NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule137NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario137Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule137NegativeService, input Rule137NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
